name: codescene-codehealth-mcp
description: CodeScene MCP Server — Code Health analysis for AI coding agents. Provides tools for code health scoring, refactoring guidance, and technical debt analysis directly in VS Code's agent mode.

codescene.onpremUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL of your self-hosted CodeScene instance (e.g. `https://codescene.mycompany.com`). Leave empty for CodeScene Cloud. [Documentation](https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/configuration-options.md#onprem_url)

codescene.defaultProjectId.markdownDescription: Pre-selects a CodeScene project by its numeric ID, skipping interactive project selection. [Documentation](https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/configuration-options.md#default_project_id)

codescene.enabledTools.markdownDescription: Comma-separated list of MCP tool names to expose. When empty, all tools are enabled. [Documentation](https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/configuration-options.md#enabled_tools)

codescene.disableVersionCheck.markdownDescription: Suppress the automatic version-check request on startup. [Documentation](https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/configuration-options.md#disable_version_check)

codescene.caBundlePath.markdownDescription: Path to a PEM-format CA certificate bundle for SSL/TLS verification. Required for corporate proxies or internal CAs. [Documentation](https://github.com/codescene-oss/codescene-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/configuration-options.md#ca_bundle)

codescene.enabled.description: Enable or disable the CodeScene MCP Server.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test tests/config.test.js tests/download-binary.test.js tests/package-platform.test.js && node --require ./tests/vscode-mock-preload.cjs --test tests/extension.test.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run compile && c8 --reporter=cobertura --reporter=text --temp-directory=./coverage/tmp sh -c 'node --test tests/config.test.js tests/download-binary.test.js tests/package-platform.test.js && node --require ./tests/vscode-mock-preload.cjs --test tests/extension.test.js'
